ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT MILO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, HELEN JIMENEZ, NERI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILO PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,350.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF PRODUCED SUFFICIENT DOCUMENTATION OF ON GOING DIMINISHED USE AND CONDITIONS OF THE PROPERTY FOR THE DURATION OF THE TENANCY. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO ALL OTHER DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
